title: React Hooks
description: Master React hooks for adding state, side effects, and other features to functional components.
learningObjectives: Understand what hooks are and why they're used
Apply custom hooks for reusable logic

subtopics.title: Introduction to Hooks
useEffect Hook
useContext Hook
useRef Hook
Custom Hooks

recommendedTools.name: React Hooks Reference
recommendedTools.reason: Complete reference for all React hooks

glossary.definition: A function that lets you use state and other React features in functional components.
A React hook for performing side effects in functional components.
A React hook for consuming context values without nesting.
A React hook for creating a mutable ref object that persists across renders.
A user-defined hook that extracts and reuses stateful logic.
Operations that affect something outside the component, like data fetching or subscriptions.
An array passed to useEffect that specifies when the effect should re-run.
